bundle_summary: Meta-case documenting service lines where public pre-SOW data is thin or unavailable. Per SOURCE_NOTES.md, four service lines need synthetic artifacts: fire_safety, das, electrical, itad.

documented_gap_service_lines.reason: vendor manuals plentiful, real device schedules hide behind login portals
documented_gap_service_lines.synthesis_recommendation: Generate XLSX with 200+ devices across 4-floor hospital model: smoke/heat detectors, pull stations, horns/strobes, speakers, sprinkler flow/tamper switches, kitchen suppression. NFPA 72-style addressable layout.

documented_gap_service_lines.reason: almost no public real customer artifacts (mostly vendor whitepapers)
documented_gap_service_lines.synthesis_recommendation: Generate 4-story building DAS RFP narrative referencing NFPA 1225 + UL 2524 + IFC §510. Public-safety frequencies, BDA, donor antenna, indoor antennas. 95% coverage at -95 dBm DAQ 3.0+.

documented_gap_service_lines.reason: embedded inside larger MEP packages, not standalone pre-SOW packets
documented_gap_service_lines.synthesis_recommendation: Generate panel schedule XLSX with mid-sheet totals and merged-cell breaker rows. 84-circuit panel (3-phase 4-wire) with sub-totals per phase.
Generate asset-list XLSX with OEM/serial/condition columns. 50-500 mixed assets across categories with realistic data classifications.
